title: lepechinia subhastata
intro: Lepechinia subhastata, also known as Narrow-leaved Mountain Mint, is a perennial herb native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. The herbal preparations of Lepechinia subhastata can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and alleviate various health concerns.
